Our Services

Organ
Transplantation

Specialized care for liver and kidney transplantation — from initial consultation through full recovery.

Liver Transplant

Living-donor and cadaveric liver transplantation for adults and children, by an experienced transplant surgical team.

Learn more

Kidney Transplant

Living-donor and cadaveric kidney transplantation. Tissue matching, experienced nephrologists, and complete pre- and post-operative care.

Learn more

Why Medical Park

World-Class
Transplant Care

25+ years of experience

One of the first and largest transplant centers in Turkey and Europe.

Lowest complication rates

Officially recognized as the center with the lowest side-effect rates in Turkey.

International medical team

Surgeons trained at leading hospitals in Japan, the USA, and Europe.

Antalya — a city by the sea

Recover in a gentle Mediterranean climate, away from stress.

How It Works

Your Path to Recovery

Inquiry & Consultation

Submit your medical records — our specialists will evaluate your case free of charge.

Arrival & Assessment

Airport pickup, accommodation, and comprehensive pre-operative evaluation.

Transplant Surgery

Surgery in one of 10 operating theaters equipped to transplant standards.

Recovery & Follow-up

ICU and ward monitoring, post-discharge checkups, and ongoing remote support.

Our Specialists
